message: Cached live context proxy method metadata and routed through GetObject/SetObject; added live setting proxy BenchmarkDotNet coverage.

Verified LiveContextProxy<T> caches per-interface MethodInfo accessors in static metadata and routes get/set through LiveSettingStore.GetObject/SetObject without per-call GetMethod, MakeGenericMethod, or reflection Invoke. Static accessor dictionary is initialized once per closed T and then only read; store access remains lock-protected. LiveSettingProxyBenchmarks covers repeated interface settings get/set operations with MemoryDiagnoser and 1,000/100,000 iteration cases. Validation passed: focused PluginLiveSetting tests 6/6 passed; benchmark project build succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors; agentq doctor reported doctor ok.
